common.join_newsletter_desc: No spam — just launch news, previews, and early access opportunities for FirstSpawn.com.

login.title: WELCOME TO FIRSTSPAWN
login.subtitle: Log in to access your favorite servers and communities.

register.title: START YOUR JOURNEY
register.subtitle: Join the verified ecosystem for Minecraft and Hytale.
register.marketingConsentLabel: I want to receive product updates and marketing emails from FirstSpawn.
register.legalDisclaimer: By joining, you agree to our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy. We never post to connected accounts without permission.

activation.title: CHECK YOUR INBOX
activation.message: You will soon receive an email on the following address:
activation.instruction: Please activate your account by clicking on the link provided in it.
activation.spam_warning: Please remember to check your spam and trash box!!!
activation.provider_warning: Services like Hotmail, Yahoo, AOL often mistakenly identify the activation email as spam!

cta.title: Ready to find your
cta.subtitle: Stop wasting time on pay-to-win billboards. Discover communities backed by verified uptime and real player retention.

brand.name: FIRSTSPAWN
brand.description: The infrastructure for reliable voxel multiplayer discovery. We prioritize performance data over paid placements.

bottom.copyright: © {year} FirstSpawn. Not affiliated with Hypixel Studios or Mojang.

cookie_consent.message: We use cookies to ensure you get the best pixel-perfect experience on our website.

landing.building_desc: More than just a server list — FirstSpawn is a social network for Minecraft & Hytale players. Sync your cross-platform identity, leave reviews backed by verified playtime, solve puzzles to win prizes, form Guilds, and earn reputation badges.
landing.notify_desc: Join thousands of players waiting for launch. Early subscribers get exclusive access & founding member perks!
